name: maximus
description: Open, browse, edit and search files of several hundred GB without saturating RAM or disk.

maximus.indexEveryNLines.description: Number of lines between each sparse index entry.

maximus.autoOpenThresholdMB.description: File size threshold (MB) above which Maximus is suggested.

maximus.maxHitsInWebview.description: Maximum number of search results sent to the webview for navigation/highlighting. Beyond this, the total count remains accurate but only the first hits are navigable (avoids webview memory saturation on multi-GB files).

maximus.searchWorkers.description: Number of worker threads for search/replace. 0 = auto (uses os.availableParallelism()). 1 = single-threaded. Capped at the number of available cores.

scripts.vscode:prepublish: npm run compile && npm run prepare-media
